title: Integration
description: Understand integration as the reverse process of differentiation and as a tool for finding areas under curves.

contentBlocks.text: If $F'(x) = f(x)$, then $\int f(x)dx = F(x) + C$, where $C$ is the constant of integration.

The power rule for integration: 

$$\int x^n dx = \frac{x^{n+1}}{n+1} + C, \quad (n \neq -1)$$
